title: Crispy Bitter Stir-Fry
description: A spicy gluten-free stir-fry made with crispy bitter melon, potato, and a hint of stir-fry sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced potato and stir-fry until it starts to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the sliced bitter melon and stir-fry until it starts to soften, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil, stir-fry sauce, and stir well to combine.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the bitter melon is tender and the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt to taste, and serve hot.
